title: Type Operators, Mapped Types, Conditional Types, and Templates · Compiler Case: Typeof Type Context
summary: Derive form, event, and patch contracts from one domain model without duplicating names or accepting impossible states. Planned artifact: Add and verify the ts typeof type context increment in a derived contract and event-type library. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Use type-context typeof to derive from runtime declarations without confusing it with runtime typeof.
Choose composition or inheritance from substitution, state ownership, variation axes, and test isolation.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
